# AgentZone
> Unified explorer for trustless AI agents

## About
AgentZone indexes 37K+ ERC-8004 verified AI agents across Base and Arbitrum chains. It provides identity verification, reputation tracking, and x402 payment monitoring in a single interface.

## API
- GET /api/v1/agents — List agents (paginated, sortable)
- GET /api/v1/agents/{id} — Agent detail with metadata
- GET /api/v1/search?q= — Semantic search across agents
- GET /api/v1/stats — Network statistics
- GET /api/v1/analytics — Time-series analytics
- GET /api/v1/discover — JSON-LD agent discovery (machine-readable)

## Links
- Site: https://agentzone.fun
- Explorer: https://agentzone.fun/explore
- API Docs: https://agentzone.fun/docs
- GitHub: https://github.com/agentzonemkp/agentzone
